message:
fix(dlfcn_abi): delegate host handles to host dlclose during bootstrap

During bootstrap passthrough, dlopen can return real host library handles
(not just the main program handle). dlclose was incorrectly returning -1
for all non-main-program handles, instead of delegating to host dlclose.

This fix properly routes non-main-program handles to the host's dlclose
during bootstrap, allowing dlopen/dlclose cycles to work correctly even
before the membrane is fully initialized.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
